channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: CLARITY Act sees ‘big step forward’ as markup set for May 14
item.description: Coinbase chief policy officer Faryar Shirzad said the date is a “big step forward” and is essential for supporting innovation in the US.

item.title: JUST IN: BlackRock to launch tokenized money-market funds on Ethereum. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFB4MHRxMGptU1l1OVpWT3dqSHRYSWt2OTlJdnhoX3RTMGhhSlhQeFR3WklnaWpsQ3ZVc3g1MG5nQm11TG9XVTNVUVozSmYxMHVrQUtad2NEVGtobTV2dTJOa293?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: BlackRock to launch token…

item.title: Bitcoin stalls as BTC ETF outflows hit $268M: Will new Fed chair restore the rally?
item.description: Rising Bitcoin ETF outflows and liquidations signal short-term caution, but a weak DXY and the eventual appointment of a new Fed chair could resume the rally.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senate Banking Committee schedules crypto Clarity Act vote for May 14 at 10:30 AM EST. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9lRmlxbERqcGpzeUlfN2hvN2ZJRnNlYkdmSmY4elFwSFlRZHJCN3RJWkhoMGhGV1BqTElqQ1BqX1c1X2JON3lPU1F3MldLM0Y2LVE3MWNfRWlaWkNJMVg0UWxn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senate Banking Commi…

item.title: Senate Banking Committee plans to hold key market structure hearing on Thursday
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee announced it would hold its markup hearing for the Clarity Act on March 14.

item.title: Crypto exchanges pushed US lawmakers to bar provision on risky tokens: Report
item.description: Three companies reportedly pressed US senators for changes to a crypto bill, removing language that would require them to offer trading on tokens “not readily susceptible to manipulation.”

item.title: Banking Industry Says Clarity Act Stablecoin Proposal Would Enable 'Evasion'
item.description: Senators had hoped the issue, which has plagued crypto legislation for months, had been put to bed with a proposed compromise last week.

item.title: Estonia's FSA issues investor warning about Zondacrypto
item.description: The news follows an investigation into the crypto exchange by Polish law enforcement officials and reports of customer withdrawal issues.

item.title: Swiss Bitcoin reserve campaign set to lapse after failing to gather signatures
item.description: Organizers failed to collect enough signatures to trigger a referendum that would have required the Swiss National Bank to hold Bitcoin in its reserves.

item.title: JUST IN: Strategy CEO Phong Le tells CNBC they may sell BTC over equity to increase "bitcoin per share" 👀 "We will sell our bitcoin to pay the yield where it's accretive to our shareholders. And that's defined as accretive to bitcoin per share." $MSTR - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9qTkVfcWM5bndXMVctQlhWM0x0aEtDRzNqMk5yU0h2Yzg1RDJuOFFBQ0p5cWo5NEgwVlhEWlEyS0Q1WkRFZW5lcU9HNDF5NTQ3QjR2blhRMmRHRGlFYXRSVU5jekRXQzQ?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Strategy CEO Phong…

item.title: Coinbase rebounds as altcoins surge with bitcoin holding above $80,000
item.description: Tokenization and digital asset-infrastructure stocks climbed as SEC Chair Paul Atkins signaled support for onchain finance rules.

item.title: Kraken parent company applies for OCC charter in move toward banking
item.description: The US banking regulator has already approved similar charter applications for Coinbase, Ripple Labs, BitGo, Circle, Fidelity Digital Assets and Paxos.

item.title: TeraWulf's AI Compute Revenue Outpaces Bitcoin Mining Amid $427 Million Loss
item.description: Publicly traded Bitcoin miner and data center operator TeraWulf reported a hefty net loss in Q1 as its AI revenue took over from BTC.

item.title: Intel Stock Hits All-Time High After Preliminary Chip Deal With Apple
item.description: A preliminary Apple-Intel manufacturing agreement—backed by a White House push—sent Intel stock above $130 on Friday.

item.title: Elizabeth Warren Wants Meta to Spill All on Stablecoin Plans Ahead of Clarity Act Votes
item.description: The Senate Democrat said Meta’s reported plans to partner with a third-party stablecoin issuer could undermine “competition, privacy… and financial stability.”

item.title: Tokenized “real-world” assets (RWAs) have surged 10x in two years, now topping $30B — with nearly half held in U.S. Treasury debt. The growth reflects rising institutional demand to put traditional financial instruments onchain, from government bonds and co - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE41WHY4UnotaGNaVTZhMHUwR09tSFZoS0NnalBOdVc5RXBBMFo4dXFMTExMcmxlcUxsbThhZW1NREJJQm41cFF5UUQ1WUtPWmY3bjRZX3NMSGRaa3hvazRtMw?oc=5" target="_blank">Tokenized “real-world” assets (RWAs)…

item.title: Will Strategy Sell Bitcoin This Year? Traders Are Convinced After Saylor Comments
item.description: Users of Myriad's prediction market believe it's likely Strategy will part ways with some of its Bitcoin holdings this year.

item.title: AI agents fueled a frenzy of startup building at the Consensus Miami EasyA hackathon
item.description: Nearly 1,000 developers competed at the venue, from ecosystems like Base, Solana, and others arriving from companies like Microsoft and Google, most racing to build products around the theme of AI agents.

item.title: Price predictions 5/8: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
item.description: Bitcoin continues to find buyers on each dip, but charts suggest traders may struggle to overcome the $84,000-$92,000 resistance cluster.

item.title: Trump Admin Launches Pentagon UFO Website With Declassified Files
item.description: The new website follows years of hearings, investigations, and pressure for greater UAP transparency.

item.title: Exodus launches AI agent-focused stablecoin on Solana
item.description: The crypto wallet company pairs the XO Cash token with software tools that let AI agents transact using preset spending controls and stablecoin payments.

item.title: SEC chair Atkins signals new rules for onchain markets, AI-driven finance
item.description: The SEC chair linked the rise of AI-powered financial systems with growing demand for blockchain-based market infrastructure and automated settlement.

item.title: Kraken Parent Payward Applies for OCC National Trust Bank Charter
item.description: Crypto exchange Kraken is seeking a U.S. federal banking charter to complement its Wyoming SPDI subsidiary.

item.title: US Senator questions Mark Zuckerberg on Meta’s stablecoin plans
item.description: Elizabeth Warren asked the Meta CEO to provide details on a stablecoin integration to the platform, a week after a small rollout to creators in Colombia and the Philippines.

item.title: Bitcoin profit-taking may 'accelerate' as price hits 3-month high: Analyst
item.description: Despite the short-term price recovery, Bitcoin remains in a bear market, according to CryptoQuant analyst Julio Moreno.

item.title: Crypto Biz: Wall Street wants more than just Bitcoin
item.description: Institutional capital is returning to crypto as Bitcoin ETFs surge, prediction markets mature and banks accelerate tokenized finance adoption.

item.title: Bitcoin Miner IREN Secures $3.4 Billion Nvidia AI Deal, With $2.1 Billion Share Option
item.description: Nvidia gains rights to invest up to $2.1 billion in IREN as companies race to lock down massive AI compute capacity.

item.title: Kraken parent goes for the OCC charter in bid to become a federal crypto bank
item.description: Payward’s application would add a federally regulated trust company to the Kraken group’s existing Wyoming bank charter and Fed master account.

item.title: Strategy's MSTR stock signals 80% rally potential despite Q1 loss
item.description: MSTR is forming an ascending triangle pattern on its weekly price chart, pointing to a breakout move toward $350 in the coming months.

item.title: 🚨NEW: In remarks given at an event today, SEC Chair @SECPaulSAtkins laid out a handful of areas where the agency is considering modernizing securities rules for onchain markets, including potential rulemakings around what qualifies as an exchange, bro - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1OenlpREZBcWJRRmhhMjFRWDlaamVQWm5CTUhTdVp5OGlkcFFCUl9mTlJxTWg4aXU2b3BXSV9KSWw4OGNWcmZfOExZN1E0SHFpUjdhdEtuQml0Ql9CSzBhZEhSUTFrQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEW: In remarks given at a…

item.title: Bitcoin bulls battle for $80K control as US jobs data delivers surprise
item.description: Bitcoin traders called a "healthy bullish backtest" as BTC price action kept them guessing over whether $80,000 could be reclaimed.

item.title: On-Chain, In Court: What happened in crypto legal news this week
item.description: US authorities find an additional $10 million connected to Sam Bankman-Fried, the former CEO of Celsius ditches his legal team and a new law in Washington state bans crypto ATMs.

item.title: ECB's Lagarde’s digital euro warning: Why Europe shouldn’t just copy the U.S. stablecoin model
item.description: Lagarde warned that large stablecoins like Tether and USDC, which now dominate a $310 billion market, pose financial stability risks and could transmit stress to underlying asset markets during periods of turmoil.

item.title: Revolut Users See Erroneous Bitcoin Price Alert Showing BTC Near Zero Some Revolut users received erroneous alerts today showing Bitcoin’s price falling near zero, with screenshots indicating BTC briefly displayed around 0.02 in the app. Revolut attribute - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE95bF94RWxNdGRGbE04aTFIVWRud2J3emdyRndvMm1jZm9OckszTWIzMjVXaUxTbXU4eUROclRTVHN3SnpnVUFwdnJhWVNSZEFoNVBOUUJ5Q1lVQm1MM0VfVVdaMA?oc=5" target="_blank">Revolut Users See Erroneous Bitc…

item.title: ECB’s Lagarde Pushes Back on Euro Stablecoins, Warns of ‘Structural Weaknesses’
item.description: The European Central Bank chief says Europe "knows which port it is sailing to,” and it's not towards a euro stablecoin.

item.title: Bitcoin’s ‘overbought’ signal flashes price top warning with focus on $78K
item.description: Bitcoin’s 36% rally from $60,000 resulted in the relative strength index flashing a potential top signal not seen since early 2026.

item.title: Coinbase Outage Disrupts Crypto Trading and Transfers Amid Amazon Service Failure
item.description: Coinbase says Amazon Web Services failures across multiple availability zones caused an extended outage on its platform.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: AI Won’t End Human Work, Andreessen Horowitz Partner Says
item.description: a16z partner David George argues AI will reshape work instead of erasing it.

item.title: XRP pushes toward $1.40 as tightening range lowers breakout chances
item.description: Price moved higher on a late volume burst, with traders watching whether compression near $1.39-$1.40 finally resolves into a larger move.

item.title: Kelp DAO exploit prompts DeFi protocols to rethink oracle providers
item.description: Solv Protocol and other DeFi projects are migrating to Chainlink infrastructure after the $293 million exploit exposed risks in third-party bridge and oracle setups.

item.title: Bitcoin Price Crashes Near Zero on Revolut, Blamed on Third-Party Service Disruption
item.description: Bitcoin briefly plummeted to about 2 cents on Revolut due to what the financial platform described as a third-party service disruption.

item.title: Europe sees ‘hyperconcentration’ of crypto wrench attacks as losses hit $101M
item.description: Criminal teams behind wrench attacks usually consist of three to five people, often posing as delivery drivers or luring victims into ambushes, said CertiK.

item.title: Australian police seize $4.1M in Bitcoin tied to darknet market
item.description: NSW Police said the Bitcoin was allegedly linked to illegal darknet marketplace activity involving drugs and weapons.

item.title: XRP New Addresses, Active Supply Plunge Amid Shift to ‘Institutional Rails’
item.description: New XRP addresses hit multi-year lows, per Glassnode data, as the network shifts from "retail speculation" to institutional usage.

item.title: How AI became crypto's favorite reason to cut staff
item.description: Coinbase, Block and Crypto.com have all cited AI to justify recent cuts, though Scale AI’s Jason Droege suspects companies are using the technology as cover.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) gains 6.3%, leading index higher
item.description: Internet Computer (ICP), up 5.8% from Thursday, was also a top performer.

item.title: Stablecoins have their 'permission slip.' Now comes the hard part.
item.description: Executives from MoonPay, Ripple and Paxos said at Consensus Miami 2026 that regulation has accelerated stablecoin adoption, but infrastructure, privacy and distribution remain major hurdles.

item.title: Coinbase bulls point to crypto legislation and stablecoins after earnings miss
item.description: Analysts say Coinbase’s long-term growth may depend more on stablecoins and U.S. crypto legislation than a rebound in trading activity.

item.title: Zcash Targeting Post-Quantum Crypto Milestone by 2027
item.description: The privacy-focused cryptocurrency plans to launch a quantum-recoverable wallet within a month as it outlines its roadmap.

item.title: U.S. added 115K jobs in April, nearly doubling expectations
item.description: The data comes ahead of what's expected to be a new Federal Reserve chairman taking the reins at the U.S. central bank later this month.

item.title: Morning Minute: Coinbase Misses Earnings on Surprise Loss
item.description: Coinbase missed earnings, but one of its newest businesses is scaling incredibly fast—and Tom Lee may finally be slowing his Ethereum buying.

item.title: U.S. hiring slowdown could be great for bitcoin — unless wages spoil the party
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 8, 2026

item.title: Coinbase blames AWS for hours-long crypto trading outage
item.description: Coinbase says the outage has been fully resolved but that it will investigate the incident fully.

item.title: Arbitrum DAO Votes to Unlock $70 Million for Kelp DAO Exploit Relief
item.description: Arbitrum DAO voted to release the Kelp exploit funds, but a U.S. Court restraining notice has put the approved transfer in legal jeopardy.

item.title: LATEST: 📊 Bitcoin and Ethereum remain the most widely held digital assets among fund managers, while interest in Aave, Sui, and Tron is growing, per CoinShares. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5mYlpqY09LenA2MnJaenFmNVV0elc5cGFZMVBPN1U4M3NqMVpvWEZXTU11eFBkQXhfWmU2YkR4c2pINlZwMF9VOGJ2YW9lcjk5UTd6S2tzekZoNEczVlc2MVhocHQ?oc=5" target="_blank">LATEST: 📊 Bitcoin and Ethereum…

item.title: Bitcoin retreats below $80,000, liquidating $300 million in futures bets
item.description: BTC fell under $80,000 after U.S. strikes in Iran sent oil briefly above $100, triggering liquidations and a shift toward bearish positioning.

item.title: AUSTRAC Launches Supervision Campaigns as Australia's Crypto Regulatory Reforms Kick In
item.description: The campaigns target over-the-counter operators and local exchanges as new laws expand oversight to custody and brokerage services.

item.title: Stablecoin card spend is growing 100% year over year, Rain exec says
item.description: Stablecoin settlement enables weekend/holiday settlement, reducing trapped capital by over 40%. This improves card economics and financial flexibility for issuers.

item.title: Bitcoin shows 2-cent price on Revolut as users report apparent BTC display glitch
item.description: Screenshots showed BTC briefly far below global market prices, though it remains unclear whether any trades were executed at those levels or whether the move was a display issue.
